place: Bophut Hills, Bo Phut, Koh Samui, Thailand
title: Bophut Hills Hilltop Villa — Koh Phangan Panorama
blurb: A six-bedroom hilltop villa in the scenic Bophut Hills, with a sunrise-to-sunset panorama over Samui's northern shore and Koh Phangan — a 25-metre infinity pool, Thai sala, cathedral-ceiling living, and a resident chef and villa manager.
detail:
A tropical hilltop paradise in the scenic Bophut Hills, just a 15–20 minute drive from Koh Samui International Airport. The six-bedroom villa is strategically positioned for a breathtaking sunrise-to-sunset panorama over Samui's pristine northern shore and the enchanting Koh Phangan — 'Full Moon Island' — on the horizon. Secluded and serene, it remains surprisingly close to key destinations: around 10 minutes to Fisherman's Village and 15 minutes to the vibrant lifestyle of Chaweng.

Each of the six bedrooms is designed for comfort and style with its own private sea-view terrace, and recent renovations have introduced a lighter, more contemporary ambiance throughout. The living and dining space, crowned by a soaring cathedral ceiling, serves as a spectacular social hub — overlooking the 25-metre infinity-edge pool, a traditional Thai-style sala and the mesmerising sea beyond.

The experience is elevated by a dedicated team, including an experienced multilingual villa manager and a resident chef, alongside an internal elevator, gym, sauna, jacuzzi, spa room and kids' room. From culinary delights to personalised service, it is a polished, turnkey hilltop retreat for families or groups seeking the epitome of private villa living on Koh Samui.
